results.title: Jerome Flynn confirmed among new cast joining near-perfect sci-fi drama Alien: Earth for season 2
results.description: Tracey Ullman and Sam Spruell have also joined the cast.

results.title: As work permits for Haitians with TPS expire, South Florida rallies to protect them
results.description: MIAMI — Life as she knows it might be ending on Friday. Lilly, a 33-year-old community organizer, has lived in the U.S. for the last seven years. Like 350,000 other Haitians nationwide, she’s facing the loss of her deportation protections...

results.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle’s Kids Reunite With King Charles
results.description: Reuters Prince Harry and Meghan Markle brought their two children to England to reunite with King Charles III after four years apart. Harry, 41, and Meghan, 44, brought seven-year-old Archie and five-year-old Lilibet to see their grandfather, according to Page Six , after previously nixing plans over concerns about the security of their visit. Read more at The Daily Beast.

results.title: The Aroma – Song by Fat Joe, Jadakiss, Stove God Cooks, and Cool & Dre
results.description: "The Aroma" by Fat Joe, Jadakiss, Stove God Cooks, and Cool & Dre is a single off Joe's upcoming album "Organized Crhyme." The post The Aroma – Song by Fat Joe, Jadakiss, Stove God Cooks, and Cool & Dre appeared first on HotNewHipHop .
